Script.name: GaldamUI
Script.script:
GaldamUI = GaldamUI or {} if GaldamUI._handlers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI._handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end GaldamUI._handlers = {} GaldamUI.VERSION = "v47" -- 업데이트 적용 확인용 (화면 우상단 표시) local PANEL_W = 0.20 -- 우측 탭 패널 폭 local BOTTOM_H = 120 -- 하단 HUD 바 높이 -- 커스텀 이미지 GaldamUI.imgDir = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamui" pcall(function() lfs.mkdir(GaldamUI.imgDir) end) local IMGBASE = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Binkaze/galdamoosound@main/" local IMGFILES = {"up-arrow.png","down arrow.png","left-arrow.png","right-arrow.png","up.png","down.png","in.png","out.png","look.png","search.png", "status_cold.png","status_heat.png","status_wet.png","status_drunk.png","status_caffeine.png","status_smoke.png","status_nausea.png", "status_bleeding.png","status_stunned.png","status_broken.png","status_hunger.png","status_thirst.png","status_fatigue.png","status_heavy.png"} local STANCE_IMGFILES = {"stance_stand_v2.png","stance_sit_v2.png","stance_prone_v2.png","stance_walk_v2.png","stance_fastwalk_v2.png","stance_run_v2.png"} for _, f in ipairs(STANCE_IMGFILES) do IMGFILES[#IMGFILES + 1] = f end local STANCE_DISABLED_IMGFILES = {"stance_walk_v2_disabled.png","stance_fastwalk_v2_disabled.png","stance_run_v2_disabled.png"} for _, f in ipairs(STANCE_DISABLED_IMGFILES) do IMGFILES[#IMGFILES + 1] = f end for i = 0, 20 do IMGFILES[#IMGFILES + 1] = string.format("stance_cd_%02d.png", i) end local function imgPath(f) return GaldamUI.imgDir .. "/" .. f end local function imgTag(f, sz) return "
" end GaldamUI.imgTag = imgTag; GaldamUI.imgPath = imgPath local CSS_BTN = "background-color: rgba(34,84,116,205); border:2px solid #4fa3c7; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_ACT = "background-color: rgba(38,70,48,215); border:2px solid #5fae6f; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_OFF = "background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0.42 rgba(20,13,15,255), stop:0.46 #cc2b2b, stop:0.54 #cc2b2b, stop:0.58 rgba(20,13,15,255)); border:2px solid #7a2e2e; border-radius:6px; color:#9a7478; font-size:18px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" -- 상태 아이콘: 한글 이름(툴팁) + severity 색(경고/심함/위험) GaldamUI.STNAME = {cold="추위/저체온", heat="더위", wet="젖음", drunk="취함", caffeine="카페인", smoke="흡연", nausea="메스꺼움", bleeding="출혈", stunned="감전/기절", broken="골절", hunger="배고픔", thirst="목마름", fatigue="피로", heavy="과적재"} GaldamUI.STSEV = {[1]={b="#f1c40f", bg="rgba(60,52,12,210)"}, [2]={b="#e67e22", bg="rgba(72,42,12,215)"}, [3]={b="#e74c3c", bg="rgba(74,20,20,225)"}} -- 스킬/능력치 한글 라벨 GaldamUI.SKNAME = { brawn="완력", brains="지능", cool="침착", reflexes="반사", endurance="지구력", senses="감각", pistols="권총", rifles="소총", quickdraw="속사", dodge="회피", craft="제작", repair="수리", locksmith="자물쇠", climb="등반", appraise="감정", medic="의술", swim="수영", blades="도검", scavenge="수색", hack="해킹", clubs="둔기", fists="격투", pilot="조종", throw="투척", steal="소매치기", track="추적", chemistry="화학", linguist="언어", sneak="은신", fuck="정사", persuade="설득", whip="채찍", spears="창", teach="교육", fish="낚시", bombs="폭탄", torture="고문", wrestle="레슬링", science="과학", flails="철퇴", ride="승마", focus="집중", } -- 즉시 뜨는 커스텀 툴팁 (네이티브는 표시 지연이 길어 hover 핸들러로 대체) function GaldamUI.showTip(txt) if not GaldamUI.tip then return end local x, y = 0, 0 if not pcall(function() x, y = getMousePosition() end) then return end local wpx = math.max(60, math.min(240, #txt * 6 + 24)) pcall(function() GaldamUI.tip:resize(wpx, 26); GaldamUI.tip:move(x + 14, y + 18) end) GaldamUI.tip:echo("
"..txt.."
") GaldamUI.tip:show() pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamTip") end) end function GaldamUI.hideTip() pcall(function() GaldamUI.tip:hide() end) end function GaldamUI.attachTip(w, txt) local ok = pcall(function() w:setOnEnter(function() GaldamUI.showTip(txt) end) w:setOnLeave(function() GaldamUI.hideTip() end) end) if not ok then pcall(function() w:setToolTip(""..txt.."") end) end end function GaldamUI.downloadImages() for _, f in ipairs(IMGFILES) do local lp = imgPath(f) if not (io.exists and io.exists(lp)) then downloadFile(lp, IMGBASE .. (f:gsub(" ", "%%20"))) end end end -- ===== 탭 정의 (확장형: 여기에 항목만 추가하면 새 탭 생성) ===== -- key=식별자, name=표시이름, render=콘텐츠 그리기 함수명(문자열로 늦은 바인딩) GaldamUI.TABS = { {key="players", name="접속자", icon=nil, render="renderPlayers"}, {key="skills", name="스킬", icon=nil, render="renderSkills"}, {key="help", name="도움말", icon=nil, render="renderHelp"}, {key="ach", name="도전과제", icon=nil, render="renderAch"}, {key="events", name="이벤트", icon=nil, render="renderEvents"}, } function GaldamUI.build() -- 기존 정리 (구버전 우측 HUD 요소 포함 — 재로드 시 잔재 제거) for _, k in ipairs({"bottom","rpanel","panel","info","dpad","act","statusBar"}) do if GaldamUI[k] then pcall(function() GaldamUI[k]:hide() end) end end -- ===== 하단 HUD 바 (전체폭, 최하단) ===== GaldamUI.bottom = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamBottom", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=BOTTOM_H}) -- 상태 아이콘 슬롯 (onStatus 에서 px 배치) GaldamUI.statusSlots = {} for i = 1, 14 do local s = Geyser.Label:new({name="stSlot"..i, x=4, y=4, width=46, height=46}, GaldamUI.bottom) s:hide(); GaldamUI.statusSlots[i] = s end -- 게이지 4 (가로, 좌측 78%) GaldamUI.gauges = {} local function gauge(name, label, color, gx, w) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({name=name, x=gx, y=58, width=(w or "19%"), height=56}, GaldamUI.bottom) g.front:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..color.."; border-radius:5px;") g.back:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px;") g.text:setStyleSheet("color:#ffffff; font-size:13px; padding-left:5px;") g:setValue(100,100,""..label..""); return g end GaldamUI.hp = gauge("GaldamHP", "혈액", "#c0392b", "1%", "12.5%") GaldamUI.cons = gauge("GaldamCon", "의식", "#27ae60", "14%", "12.5%") GaldamUI.thirst = gauge("GaldamThi", "목마름", "#2471a3", "27%", "12.5%") GaldamUI.hunger = gauge("GaldamHun", "배고픔", "#d68910", "40%", "12.5%") GaldamUI.stress = gauge("GaldamStr", "스트레스", "#f1c40f", "53%", "12.5%") GaldamUI.stamina = gauge("GaldamStm", "기력", "#16a085", "66%", "12.5%") GaldamUI.buildStanceControl() -- ===== 우측 탭 패널 ===== GaldamUI.rpanel = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamRPanel", x="-"..PANEL_W*100 .."%", y=0, width=PANEL_W*100 .."%", height="100%"}) -- 위치 헤더 GaldamUI.locHeader = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamLoc", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=40}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.locHeader:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#cfe8f0; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.locHeader:echo("
갯담마을
") -- 버전 스탬프 (우상단, 업데이트 적용 확인용) GaldamUI.verTag = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamVer", x="74%", y=2, width="25%", height=14}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.verTag:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); color:#587584; qproperty-alignment:'AlignRight';") GaldamUI.verTag:echo(""..(GaldamUI.VERSION or "?").."") -- 실시간 방 패널 (사람/물건 — hover=명령전체, 클릭=드롭다운 메뉴). 라벨 호스트. 위치는 relayout GaldamUI.roomBox = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamRoomBox", x=0, y=44, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.roomRows = GaldamUI.roomRows or {} -- 탭 버튼 행 GaldamUI.tabBtns = {} local n = #GaldamUI.TABS for i, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local bw = math.floor(100 / n) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name="tab_"..t.key, x=((i-1)*bw) .."%", y=44, width=(bw-1) .."%", height=38}, GaldamUI.rpanel) b:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.selectTab(t.key) end) GaldamUI.attachTip(b, t.name) GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] = b end -- 콘텐츠 (스크롤 가능) GaldamUI.content = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({name="GaldamTabContent", x=0, y=88, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.content:setColor(14, 18, 26) pcall(function() GaldamUI.content:setFontSize(11) end) GaldamUI.content:setWrap(28) -- ===== d-pad 미니창 (드래그) ===== pcall(function() if GaldamUI.dpadWin then GaldamUI.dpadWin:hide() end GaldamUI.dpadWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담이동", width=176, height=190, x=30, y=300}) end) GaldamUI.dirBtns = {} local function dbtn(nm, name, img, cmd, aliases, x, y) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=y, width=50, height=50}, GaldamUI.dpadWin) b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); b:echo(imgTag(img, 34)) GaldamUI.attachTip(b, name) table.insert(GaldamUI.dirBtns, {btn=b, aliases=aliases, img=img, name=name}) return b end dbtn("dpUp", "위(올라가기)", "up.png", "올라가기", {"올라가기","up","u","위","상"}, 4, 4) dbtn("dpN", "북", "up-arrow.png", "북", {"북","north","n"}, 60, 4) dbtn("dpIn", "들어가기", "in.png", "들어가기", {"들어가기","in","enter","안","입구"}, 116, 4) dbtn("dpW", "서", "left-arrow.png", "서", {"서","west","w"}, 4, 58) dbtn("dpE", "동", "right-arrow.png", "동", {"동","east","e"}, 116, 58) dbtn("dpDn", "아래(내려가기)","down.png", "내려가기", {"내려가기","down","d","아래","하"}, 4, 112) dbtn("dpS", "남", "down arrow.png", "남", {"남","south","s"}, 60, 112) dbtn("dpOut", "나가기", "out.png", "나가기", {"나가기","out","밖","출구","exit"}, 116, 112) GaldamUI.lookBtn = Geyser.Label:new({name="dpLook", x=60, y=58, width=50, height=50}, GaldamUI.dpadWin) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 34)) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setClickCallback(function() send("look") end) GaldamUI.attachTip(GaldamUI.lookBtn, "둘러보기") -- 수배 오버레이 (좌상단) if GaldamUI.wanted then GaldamUI.wanted:hide() end GaldamUI.wanted = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamWan", x="-43%", y=4, width="20%", height=66}) GaldamUI.wanted:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(22,14,28,235); border:1px solid #5a3a6a; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.wanted:hide() GaldamUI.cycleGen = (GaldamUI.cycleGen or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = 0 GaldamUI.cycleStep(GaldamUI.cycleGen) -- 지도창 pcall(function() if not GaldamUI.mapWin then GaldamUI.mapWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담지도", width=520, height=430, x=900, y=300}) end GaldamUI.mapWin:setFontSize(14) GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음") end) -- 커스텀 툴팁 라벨 (최상위, 마지막 생성 → z순서 위) pcall(function() if GaldamUI.tip then GaldamUI.tip:hide() end GaldamUI.tip = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamTip", x=0, y=0, width=140, height=26}) GaldamUI.tip:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(16,20,28,245); border:1px solid #6fbf80; border-radius:5px; color:#eafff0;") GaldamUI.tip:hide() end) GaldamUI.built = true GaldamUI.activeTab = GaldamUI.activeTab or "players" GaldamUI.relayout() GaldamUI.selectTab(GaldamUI.activeTab) end function GaldamUI.relayout() if not GaldamUI.built then return end local w, h = getMainWindowSize() local rw = math.floor(w * PANEL_W) setBorderRight(rw); setBorderBottom(BOTTOM_H) pcall(function() GaldamUI.bottom:move(0, h - BOTTOM_H); GaldamUI.bottom:resize(w, BOTTOM_H) local ph = h - BOTTOM_H GaldamUI.rpanel:move(w - rw, 0); GaldamUI.rpanel:resize(rw, ph) -- 상하분할: [헤더] / [방 패널] / [탭 버튼] / [탭 콘텐츠] local headH, tabH, gap = 40, 32, 4 local avail = ph - headH - tabH - gap * 4 if avail < 80 then avail = 80 end local roomH = math.floor(avail * 0.52) -- 상단: 실시간 방 패널 local contentH = avail - roomH -- 하단: 탭 콘텐츠 GaldamUI.locHeader:move(0, 0); GaldamUI.locHeader:resize(rw, headH) local roomY = headH + gap GaldamUI.roomBox:move(0, roomY); GaldamUI.roomBox:resize(rw, roomH) local tabY = roomY + roomH + gap local n = #GaldamUI.TABS local bw = math.floor(rw / n) for i, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local b = GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] if b then b:move((i - 1) * bw, tabY); b:resize(bw - 2, tabH) end end GaldamUI.content:move(0, tabY + tabH + gap); GaldamUI.content:resize(rw, contentH) end) GaldamUI.renderRoom() end function GaldamUI.setExits(elist) if not GaldamUI.dirBtns then return end local avail = {} for _, e in ipairs(elist or {}) do avail[tostring(e)] = true end for _, d in ipairs(GaldamUI.dirBtns) do local on = false for _, al in ipairs(d.aliases) do if avail[al] then on = true; break end end if on then d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); d.btn:echo(imgTag(d.img, 34)) GaldamUI.attachTip(d.btn, d.name) else d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_OFF) d.btn:echo("
"..d.name.."
") GaldamUI.attachTip(d.btn, d.name.." · 막힌 길") end end end -- ===== 탭 전환 / 렌더 ===== function GaldamUI.selectTab(key) if not GaldamUI.built then return end GaldamUI.activeTab = key for _, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local b = GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] if b then if t.key == key then b:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT) else b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN) end if t.icon then b:echo(imgTag(t.icon, 28)) else b:echo("
"..t.name.."
") end end end GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderTab() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.content) then return end for _, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do if t.key == GaldamUI.activeTab then local fn = GaldamUI[t.render] if fn then pcall(fn) else GaldamUI.content:clear(); GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n (미구현)") end return end end end function GaldamUI.renderPlayers() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 접속 중\n\n") local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Players local cnt = 0 if d and d.list and d.list ~= "" then for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, ar = entry:match("([^|]*)|(.*)") GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..(nm or entry).." "..(ar or "").."\n") cnt = cnt + 1 end end if cnt == 0 then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (목록 없음)\n") end end function GaldamUI.renderSkills() GaldamUI.content:clear() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Skills local stats, skills = {}, {} if d and d.list and d.list ~= "" then for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, v, k = entry:match("([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)") if nm then local kor = GaldamUI.SKNAME[nm] or nm if k == "S" then stats[#stats+1] = {kor, v} else skills[#skills+1] = {kor, v} end end end end GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 능력치\n\n") if #stats > 0 then for _, e in ipairs(stats) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..e[1].." "..e[2].."\n") end else GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (정보 없음)\n") end GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 스킬\n\n") if #skills > 0 then for _, e in ipairs(skills) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..e[1].." "..e[2].."\n") end else GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (배운 스킬 없음)\n") end end -- 도움말 데이터 (카테고리 클릭 → 명령어/설명). 변수부는 [..]로 표기 (cecho가 <>를 색태그로 먹음) GaldamUI.HELP = { {"이동", {"동 · 서 · 남 · 북", "올라가기 · 내려가기", "들어가기 · 나가기", "왼쪽 방향키 창으로도 됩니다."}}, {"살펴보기", {"보기 [대상]", "살펴보기 [대상]", "패널 항목 클릭으로도 됩니다."}}, {"먹기·마시기", {"먹기 [음식]", "마시기 [음료]"}}, {"줍기·버리기", {"줍기 [물건] (=집기)", "버리기 [물건] (=놓기)"}}, {"장착·사용", {"장착 [무기/옷]", "사용 [물건]", "읽기 [글]"}}, {"용기·상자", {"개봉 / 덮기 [용기]", "엿보기 [용기]", "[용기]에서 [물건] 꺼내기", "[용기]에 [물건] 넣기"}}, {"복합 명령", {"조사로 자연스럽게 (동사는 맨 뒤):", "자판기에서 콜라 꺼내기", "상자에 동전 넣기", "영희에게 사과 주기", "상인에게 5000 지불", "~에서=출처 ~에게=상대 ~에=위치"}}, {"장소 명령어", {"이 방에서만 쓰는 명령.", "패널 ● 장소 명령어 또는 ex here", "예) 바다: 첨벙·담그기·들이켜기"}}, {"전투", {"공격 [상대]", "항복"}}, {"패널 사용법", {"오른쪽 패널:", "· 항목 클릭 → 상호작용 메뉴", "· ✨ = 방금 나타난 것", "· 초록=바로실행 / 회색=추가입력"}}, } function GaldamUI.helpPick(cat) GaldamUI.helpCat = (cat and cat ~= "") and cat or nil GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderHelp() local mn = "GaldamTabContent" GaldamUI.content:clear() if not GaldamUI.helpCat then GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 도움말 (눌러 보기)\n\n") for _, h in ipairs(GaldamUI.HELP) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" ▸ ") pcall(function() echoLink(mn, h[1], "GaldamUI.helpPick([[" .. h[1] .. "]])", h[1], true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") end else GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● " .. GaldamUI.helpCat .. "\n\n") for _, h in ipairs(GaldamUI.HELP) do if h[1] == GaldamUI.helpCat then for _, ln in ipairs(h[2]) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. ln .. "\n") end break end end GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ") pcall(function() echoLink(mn, "← 목록으로", "GaldamUI.helpPick()", "뒤로", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") end end function GaldamUI.renderEvents() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 진행 중 이벤트\n\n 🚧 준비 중\n 이벤트 시스템이 구축되면\n 여기에 표시됩니다.\n") end -- 도전과제 탭 (접이식 트리): list = "id|이름|설명|달성0/1|최초자|달성수|카테고리;..." GaldamUI.achTopClosed = GaldamUI.achTopClosed or {} -- ["done"]/["todo"]=true면 접힘 GaldamUI.achCatClosed = GaldamUI.achCatClosed or {} -- ["done:전투"]=true면 접힘 GaldamUI.ACHCATORDER = {"전투", "탐험", "생활", "스킬", "범죄", "직업"} function GaldamUI.achToggleTop(w) GaldamUI.achTopClosed[w] = not GaldamUI.achTopClosed[w]; GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.achToggleCat(k) GaldamUI.achCatClosed[k] = not GaldamUI.achCatClosed[k]; GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.achSelect(id) if GaldamUI.achSel == id then GaldamUI.achSel = nil else GaldamUI.achSel = id end; GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderAch() local mn = "GaldamTabContent" GaldamUI.content:clear() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Achievements GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 도전과제\n\n") if not (d and d.list and d.list ~= "") then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (아직 정보가 없습니다)\n"); return end local done, todo = {}, {} for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local id, nm, desc, un, first, cnt, cat = entry:match("([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)") if nm then local rec = {id = id, nm = nm, desc = desc, first = first, cnt = cnt, cat = (cat ~= "" and cat or "기타")} if un == "1" then done[#done + 1] = rec else todo[#todo + 1] = rec end end end local function bycat(items) local g, ord = {}, {} for _, r in ipairs(items) do if not g[r.cat] then g[r.cat] = {}; ord[#ord + 1] = r.cat end table.insert(g[r.cat], r) end local sorted = {} for _, c in ipairs(GaldamUI.ACHCATORDER) do if g[c] then sorted[#sorted + 1] = c end end for _, c in ipairs(ord) do local seen = false for _, x in ipairs(sorted) do if x == c then seen = true end end if not seen then sorted[#sorted + 1] = c end end return g, sorted end local function dwidth(s) local w, i = 0, 1 while i <= #s do local b = s:byte(i) if b < 0x80 then w = w + 1; i = i + 1 elseif b < 0xE0 then w = w + 1; i = i + 2 elseif b < 0xF0 then w = w + 2; i = i + 3 else w = w + 2; i = i + 4 end end return w end local function wrap(text, maxw) local lines, cur, cw = {}, "", 0 for word in tostring(text):gmatch("%S+") do local ww = dwidth(word) if cw > 0 and cw + 1 + ww > maxw then lines[#lines + 1] = cur; cur = word; cw = ww elseif cw == 0 then cur = word; cw = ww else cur = cur .. " " .. word; cw = cw + 1 + ww end end if cur ~= "" then lines[#lines + 1] = cur end return lines end local maxw = 22 pcall(function() local px = GaldamUI.content:get_width(); if px and px > 60 then maxw = math.max(14, math.floor((px - 16) / 9)) end end) local function section(title, items, skey, color) local closed = GaldamUI.achTopClosed[skey] GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. color) pcall(function() echoLink(mn, (closed and "▶ " or "▼ ") .. title .. " (" .. #items .. ")", "GaldamUI.achToggleTop([[" .. skey .. "]])", "펼치기/접기", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") if closed then return end local g, cats = bycat(items) for _, cat in ipairs(cats) do local ck = skey .. ":" .. cat local cc = GaldamUI.achCatClosed[ck] GaldamUI.content:cecho(" ") pcall(function() echoLink(mn, (cc and "▸ " or "▾ ") .. cat .. " (" .. #g[cat] .. ")", "GaldamUI.achToggleCat([[" .. ck .. "]])", "펼치기/접기", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") if not cc then for _, r in ipairs(g[cat]) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. (skey == "done" and "✔ " or "🔒 ")) pcall(function() echoLink(mn, r.nm, "GaldamUI.achSelect([[" .. r.id .. "]])", "눌러 상세보기", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") if GaldamUI.achSel == r.id then for _, ln in ipairs(wrap(r.desc, maxw - 5)) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. ln .. "\n") end if r.first ~= "" then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" 🥇 최초 " .. r.first .. " (" .. r.cnt .. "명)\n") else GaldamUI.content:cecho(" · 미개척\n") end end end end end GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") end GaldamUI.content:cecho(" 달성 " .. #done .. " / 전체 " .. (#done + #todo) .. "\n\n") section("달성", done, "done", "") section("미달성", todo, "todo", "") end -- ===== GMCP 핸들러 ===== -- 방 패널: 항목 = "이름|라벨=명령=kind^..." (kind: go=클릭실행 / arg=추가입력 회색) function GaldamUI.parseCmds(rest) local cmds = {} for c in tostring(rest or ""):gmatch("[^%^]+") do local lbl, cmd, kind = c:match("([^=]*)=([^=]*)=([^=]*)") if lbl then cmds[#cmds + 1] = {label = lbl, cmd = cmd, kind = kind} end end return cmds end -- 항목 = "번호|이름|quick명령" (전체명령은 클릭 시 _galdamobjcmds로 on-demand) function GaldamUI.parseEntity(entry) local id, name, rest = entry:match("([^|]*)|([^|]*)|(.*)") if not id then return (entry ~= "" and entry or "?"), {}, "" end return (name ~= "" and name or "?"), GaldamUI.parseCmds(rest), id end function GaldamUI.getRow(i) GaldamUI.roomRows = GaldamUI.roomRows or {} if not GaldamUI.roomRows[i] then GaldamUI.roomRows[i] = Geyser.Label:new({name = "grRow" .. i, x = 2, y = 0, width = "97%", height = 20}, GaldamUI.roomBox) end return GaldamUI.roomRows[i] end -- hover: 간결 안내만 (명령 전체는 클릭 메뉴에서) function GaldamUI.showCmdTip(name, cmds) if not GaldamUI.tip then return end local x, y = 0, 0 if not pcall(function() x, y = getMousePosition() end) then return end local txt = "" .. name .. "
클릭하면 상호작용 메뉴" local wpx, hpx = 152, 40 pcall(function() GaldamUI.tip:resize(wpx, hpx); GaldamUI.tip:move(math.max(0, x - wpx - 6), y + 12) end) GaldamUI.tip:echo("
" .. txt .. "
") GaldamUI.tip:show() pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamTip") end) end function GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() if GaldamUI.ctxTimer then pcall(function() killTimer(GaldamUI.ctxTimer) end); GaldamUI.ctxTimer = nil end if GaldamUI.ctxMenu then pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:hide() end) end GaldamUI.ctxVisible = false GaldamUI.ctxOpenId = nil end -- 메뉴 항목 클릭 처리 (echoLink 의 Lua 명령에서 전역 경로로 호출) function GaldamUI.menuPick(cmd, isArg) GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() if isArg then printCmdLine(cmd) else send(cmd) end end -- 드롭다운 메뉴 = MiniConsole + echoLink (Label 자식은 렌더 안 됨 → 미니콘솔) -- go=클릭 즉시 실행(초록) / arg=명령창에 채워주기(회색) function GaldamUI.fillCtxMenu(name, cmds) local mn = "GaldamCtxMenu" if not GaldamUI.ctxMenu then return end local h = (#cmds + 1) * 19 + 12 pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:resize(196, h) end) pcall(function() clearWindow(mn); cecho(mn, " " .. name .. "\n") end) for _, c in ipairs(cmds) do local arg = (c.kind == "arg") local lua = "GaldamUI.menuPick([[" .. c.cmd .. "]], " .. tostring(arg) .. ")" pcall(function() if arg then setFgColor(mn, 124, 133, 142) echoLink(mn, " ○ " .. c.label .. " (입력)", lua, "추가 입력 필요: " .. c.label, true) else setFgColor(mn, 150, 216, 160) echoLink(mn, " ● " .. c.label, lua, c.label, true) end echo(mn, "\n") end) end end function GaldamUI.openCtxMenu(name, cmds, id) local mn = "GaldamCtxMenu" -- 토글: 같은 대상 메뉴가 이미 열려 있으면 다시 클릭 시 닫기 if GaldamUI.ctxVisible and tostring(GaldamUI.ctxOpenId or "") == tostring(id or "") then GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() return end if not GaldamUI.ctxMenu then GaldamUI.ctxMenu = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({name = mn, x = 0, y = 0, width = 196, height = 100}) GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setColor(13, 19, 27) pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setFontSize(11) end) GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setWrap(44) end local w = 196 local h = (#cmds + 2) * 19 + 12 local x, y = 0, 0 pcall(function() x, y = getMousePosition() end) local sw, sh = getMainWindowSize() if x + w > sw then x = sw - w - 6 end if y + h > sh then y = math.max(0, sh - h - 6) end pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:move(x, y) end) GaldamUI.ctxOpenId = id or "" GaldamUI.ctxName = name GaldamUI.fillCtxMenu(name, cmds) pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:show(); raiseWindow(mn) end) GaldamUI.ctxVisible = true if GaldamUI.ctxTimer then pcall(function() killTimer(GaldamUI.ctxTimer) end) end GaldamUI.ctxTimer = tempTimer(8, function() GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() end) -- 객체면 전체 명령을 on-demand 요청 (여기/방은 id 없음 → push의 here 그대로) if id and id ~= "" then send("_galdamobjcmds " .. id, false) end end -- on-demand 응답: 현재 열린 메뉴면 전체 명령으로 채움 function GaldamUI.onObjMenu() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.ObjMenu if not (d and d.id) then return end if tostring(d.id) == tostring(GaldamUI.ctxOpenId) then GaldamUI.fillCtxMenu(GaldamUI.ctxName or "?", GaldamUI.parseCmds(d.cmds)) pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamCtxMenu") end) end end -- ===== 전술뷰 아이콘 상호작용 (방패널 ctx메뉴 재사용) ===== function GaldamUI.normId(id) id = tostring(id or "") return (id:gsub("^#", "")) end -- 전술뷰 아이콘 클릭 → 해당 객체 상호작용 메뉴 (빈 cmds → openCtxMenu가 _galdamobjcmds 요청) function GaldamUI.tacClick(id, name) GaldamUI.openCtxMenu(name, {}, tostring(id)) end -- 한 셀에 여러 객체 겹침 → 객체 선택 메뉴 → 선택 시 그 객체 메뉴 function GaldamUI.tacStack(x, y) local objs = GaldamTac and GaldamTac.cellObj and GaldamTac.cellObj[x .. "," .. y] if not objs or #objs == 0 then return end if #objs == 1 then GaldamUI.tacClick(objs[1].id, objs[1].name); return end local mn = "GaldamCtxMenu" if not GaldamUI.ctxMenu then GaldamUI.ctxMenu = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = mn, x = 0, y = 0, width = 200, height = 100 }) GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setColor(13, 19, 27) pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setFontSize(11) end) GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setWrap(44) end local w, h = 200, (#objs + 2) * 19 + 12 local mx, my = 0, 0 pcall(function() mx, my = getMousePosition() end) local sw, sh = getMainWindowSize() if mx + w > sw then mx = sw - w - 6 end if my + h > sh then my = math.max(0, sh - h - 6) end pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:resize(w, h); GaldamUI.ctxMenu:move(mx, my) end) GaldamUI.ctxOpenId = "stack:" .. x .. "," .. y pcall(function() clearWindow(mn); cecho(mn, " 여러 개 (" .. #objs .. ")\n") end) for _, o in ipairs(objs) do local lua = "GaldamUI.tacClick([[" .. o.id .. "]],[[" .. o.name .. "]])" pcall(function() setFgColor(mn, 150, 216, 160) echoLink(mn, " ▸ " .. o.name, lua, o.name .. " 상호작용", true) echo(mn, "\n") end) end pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:show(); raiseWindow(mn) end) GaldamUI.ctxVisible = true if GaldamUI.ctxTimer then pcall(function() killTimer(GaldamUI.ctxTimer) end) end GaldamUI.ctxTimer = tempTimer(8, function() GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() end) end -- 우측 패널: 상호작용 가능 거리(인접) 객체에 ✋초록 지속표시 (✨반짝 중인 행은 건너뜀) function GaldamUI.refreshNearHighlight() if not GaldamUI.liveRows then return end local near = (GaldamTac and GaldamTac.nearIds) or {} local bu = GaldamUI.blinkUntil or {} for _, lr in ipairs(GaldamUI.liveRows) do if not bu[lr.id] then if near[GaldamUI.normId(lr.id)] then lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(46,204,113,0.20); border:1px solid #2ecc71; border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ✋ " .. lr.name .. "") else lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ▸ " .. lr.name .. "") end end end end -- 새 등장 항목 ✨반짝 펄스 (cycleStep 0.1초 루프에서 호출). 수배 별 깜빡임과 같은 결 function GaldamUI.animateRoom() if not (GaldamUI.liveRows and GaldamUI.blinkUntil) then return end local tick = GaldamUI.tick or 0 for _, lr in ipairs(GaldamUI.liveRows) do local bu = GaldamUI.blinkUntil[lr.id] if bu then if tick < bu then if (math.floor(tick / 2) % 2) == 0 then lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(241,196,15,0.38); border:1px solid #f1c40f; border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ✨ " .. lr.name .. "") else lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(241,196,15,0.10); border:1px solid #6b5a12; border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ✨ " .. lr.name .. "") end else GaldamUI.blinkUntil[lr.id] = nil local _near = GaldamTac and GaldamTac.nearIds and GaldamTac.nearIds[GaldamUI.normId(lr.id)] if _near then lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(46,204,113,0.20); border:1px solid #2ecc71; border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ✋ " .. lr.name .. "") else lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ▸ " .. lr.name .. "") end end end end end function GaldamUI.renderRoom() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.roomBox) then return end pcall(function() GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() end) GaldamUI.roomRows = GaldamUI.roomRows or {} GaldamUI.liveRows = {} local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room -- NPC 의심도 게이지: tac 데이터(GaldamTac.lastData)에서 id별 suspicion 교차참조 (서버 수정 0) local susById = {} if GaldamTac and GaldamTac.lastData and GaldamTac.lastData.actors then for _, a in ipairs(GaldamTac.lastData.actors) do local sv = a.sus and tonumber(a.sus) if a.k == "npc" and sv and sv > 0 then susById[GaldamUI.normId(tostring(a.id))] = sv end end end local function susBar(sus) local filled = math.min(5, math.floor(sus / 90 * 5 + 0.999)); if filled < 1 then filled = 1 end local col = (sus >= 61) and "#ff5040" or ((sus >= 31) and "#ff9640" or "#ffd24a") return " " .. string.rep("▰", filled) .. string.rep("▱", 5 - filled) .. "" end local rid = r and tostring(r.roomid) or nil if rid ~= GaldamUI.prevRoomId then GaldamUI.roomPage = 1 end -- 1) 항목 전부 수집 (헤더 포함, 자르지 않음) local items = {} local function add(html, col, cmds, id) items[#items + 1] = {html = html, col = col, cmds = cmds, id = id} end if not r then add("(방 정보 없음)") else add("● 사람") local hasP = false for e in tostring(r.people or ""):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, cm, id = GaldamUI.parseEntity(e); add(nm, "#a8d8ff", cm, id); hasP = true end if not hasP then add(" (없음)") end add("● 물건") local hasO = false for e in tostring(r.objects or ""):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, cm, id = GaldamUI.parseEntity(e); add(nm, "#cfe0a0", cm, id); hasO = true end if not hasO then add(" (없음)") end if r.here and tostring(r.here) ~= "" then local hc = GaldamUI.parseCmds(r.here) if #hc > 0 then add("● 장소 명령어") add(tostring(r.name or "이 방"), "#9fd0e8", hc, nil) end end end -- 2) 페이지 계산 local rowH = 20 local boxH = 200; pcall(function() boxH = GaldamUI.roomBox:get_height() end) local fitRows = math.max(1, math.floor((boxH - 2) / rowH)) local hasPage = #items > fitRows local perPage = hasPage and math.max(1, math.floor((boxH - 24) / rowH)) or fitRows local totalPages = math.max(1, math.ceil(#items / perPage)) local page = math.max(1, math.min(GaldamUI.roomPage or 1, totalPages)) GaldamUI.roomPage = page -- 3) 현재 페이지 슬라이스만 렌더 local idx, y = 0, 2 local startI = (page - 1) * perPage + 1 local endI = math.min(#items, startI + perPage - 1) for i = startI, endI do local it = items[i] idx = idx + 1 local lb = GaldamUI.getRow(idx) if it.cmds then lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") local _sv = it.id and it.id ~= "" and susById[GaldamUI.normId(it.id)] lb:echo(" ▸ " .. it.html .. "" .. (_sv and susBar(_sv) or "")) lb:setOnEnter(function() GaldamUI.showCmdTip(it.html, it.cmds) end) lb:setOnLeave(function() GaldamUI.hideTip() end) lb:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.openCtxMenu(it.html, it.cmds, it.id) end) if it.id and it.id ~= "" then GaldamUI.liveRows[#GaldamUI.liveRows + 1] = {lb = lb, id = it.id, name = it.html, col = it.col} end else lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0);") lb:echo(it.html) lb:setOnEnter(function() end); lb:setOnLeave(function() end); lb:setClickCallback(function() end) end lb:move(2, y); lb:resize("96%", rowH); lb:show(); y = y + rowH end -- 4) 페이지 버튼 (클릭 = 다음 페이지 순환) if hasPage then idx = idx + 1 local lb = GaldamUI.getRow(idx) lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,64,96,0.55); border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") lb:echo("◀ " .. page .. " / " .. totalPages .. " ▶ (클릭=다음)") lb:setOnEnter(function() end); lb:setOnLeave(function() end) lb:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.roomPage = (page % totalPages) + 1; GaldamUI.renderRoom() end) lb:move(2, y); lb:resize("96%", rowH); lb:show(); y = y + rowH end -- 새로 등장한 항목 ✨반짝 local cur = {} for _, lr in ipairs(GaldamUI.liveRows) do cur[lr.id] = true end GaldamUI.blinkUntil = GaldamUI.blinkUntil or {} if rid and GaldamUI.prevRoomId == rid then for id in pairs(cur) do if not (GaldamUI.prevIds and GaldamUI.prevIds[id]) then GaldamUI.blinkUntil[id] = (GaldamUI.tick or 0) + 32 end end end for id in pairs(GaldamUI.blinkUntil) do if not cur[id] then GaldamUI.blinkUntil[id] = nil end end GaldamUI.prevIds = cur GaldamUI.prevRoomId = rid for i = idx + 1, #GaldamUI.roomRows do pcall(function() GaldamUI.roomRows[i]:hide() end) end pcall(GaldamUI.refreshNearHighlight) end function GaldamUI.onRoom() local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room if not (GaldamUI.built and r) then return end GaldamUI.locHeader:echo(string.format("
%s
%s
", r.name or "?", r.area or "")) GaldamUI.setExits(r.exits or {}) GaldamUI.renderRoom() end function GaldamUI.cycleStep(gen) if gen ~= GaldamUI.cycleGen then return end GaldamUI.tick = (GaldamUI.tick or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = (GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 0.25 GaldamUI.renderWanted() pcall(function() GaldamUI.animateRoom() end) tempTimer(0.1, "GaldamUI.cycleStep("..gen..")") end function GaldamUI.renderWanted() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.wanted) then return end local tier = GaldamUI.curTier or 0 if tier <= 0 then GaldamUI.wanted:hide(); return end local tick = GaldamUI.tick or 0 local bl = GaldamUI.blink if bl and tick >= bl.endTick then GaldamUI.blink = nil; bl = nil end local t = (math.sin(GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 1) / 2 local col = string.format("#%02x%02x%02x", math.floor(204+(43-204)*t), math.floor(43+(107-43)*t), math.floor(43+(204-43)*t)) local stars = "" for i = 1, 6 do local ch, c if bl and bl.set[i] then local on = (math.floor(tick / bl.interval) % 2) == 0 ch = "★" if bl.kind == "add" then c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#473807" else c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#ffffff" end elseif i <= tier then ch = "★"; c = "#f1c40f" else ch = "☆"; c = "#444444" end stars = stars .. ""..ch.."" end local lines = {} lines[#lines+1] = "수배" lines[#lines+1] = stars local h = 18 + #lines * 42 if GaldamUI.wantedH ~= h then pcall(function() GaldamUI.wanted:resize("21%", h) end); GaldamUI.wantedH = h end GaldamUI.wanted:echo("
"..table.concat(lines, "
").."
") GaldamUI.wanted:show() end -- 자세/속도 아이콘 컨트롤 GaldamUI.stanceState = GaldamUI.stanceState or {posture = 0, speed = 0} GaldamUI.STANCE_ITEMS = { {key = "stand", label = "서기", icon = "stance_stand_v2.png", cmd = "서기", kind = "posture", posture = 0}, {key = "sit", label = "앉기", icon = "stance_sit_v2.png", cmd = "앉기", kind = "posture", posture = 1}, {key = "prone", label = "눕기", icon = "stance_prone_v2.png", cmd = "눕기", kind = "posture", posture = 2}, {key = "walk", label = "걷기", icon = "stance_walk_v2.png", disabledIcon = "stance_walk_v2_disabled.png", cmd = "걷기", kind = "speed", speed = 0}, {key = "fast", label = "빠른걷기", icon = "stance_fastwalk_v2.png", disabledIcon = "stance_fastwalk_v2_disabled.png", cmd = "빠른걷기", kind = "speed", speed = 1}, {key = "run", label = "달리기", icon = "stance_run_v2.png", disabledIcon = "stance_run_v2_disabled.png", cmd = "달리기", kind = "speed", speed = 2}, } function GaldamUI.stanceItem(key) for _, it in ipairs(GaldamUI.STANCE_ITEMS) do if it.key == key then return it end end return GaldamUI.STANCE_ITEMS[4] end function GaldamUI.stanceKey(pos, spd) if pos == 2 or pos == -1 then return "prone" elseif pos == 1 then return "sit" elseif spd == 2 then return "run" elseif spd == 1 then return "fast" else return "walk" end end function GaldamUI.stanceLabel(pos, spd) if pos == 2 then return "엎드림" elseif pos == -1 then return "기는 중" elseif pos == 1 then return "앉은 자세" elseif spd == 2 then return "달리는 중" elseif spd == 1 then return "빠른 걸음" else return "서서 걷기" end end function GaldamUI.stanceBg(key) if key == "prone" then return "rgba(42,30,55,235)" elseif key == "sit" then return "rgba(34,42,28,235)" elseif key == "run" then return "rgba(62,24,24,235)" elseif key == "fast" then return "rgba(56,46,20,235)" else return "rgba(20,28,38,230)" end end function GaldamUI.buildStanceControl() GaldamUI.stance = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GaldamStance", x = "79.5%", y = 58, width = "19.5%", height = 56}, GaldamUI.bottom) GaldamUI.stance:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.toggleStanceMenu() end) GaldamUI.attachTip(GaldamUI.stance, "자세/속도 변경") GaldamUI.stanceMenu = Geyser.Container:new({name = "GaldamStanceMenu", x = "79.5%", y = 4, width = "19.5%", height = 110}, GaldamUI.bottom) GaldamUI.stanceOpts = {} for i, it in ipairs(GaldamUI.STANCE_ITEMS) do local row = math.floor((i - 1) / 3) local col = (i - 1) % 3 local x = (col * 33.34) .. "%" local y = row * 56 local b = Geyser.Label:new({name = "stanceOpt_" .. it.key, x = x, y = y, width = "32%", height = 52}, GaldamUI.stanceMenu) b:setClickCallback((function(item) return function() GaldamUI.pickStance(item.key) end end)(it)) b:echo(imgTag(it.icon, 42)) GaldamUI.attachTip(b, it.label) GaldamUI.stanceOpts[it.key] = b end GaldamUI.stanceMenu:hide() GaldamUI.stanceMenuVisible = false GaldamUI.stanceCd = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GaldamStanceCd", x = "79.5%", y = 58, width = "19.5%", height = 56}, GaldamUI.bottom) GaldamUI.stanceCd:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); border:0px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.stanceCd:hide() GaldamUI.renderStanceButton() end function GaldamUI.toggleStanceMenu() if GaldamUI.stanceCooldownActive then return end if not GaldamUI.stanceMenu then return end if GaldamUI.stanceMenuVisible then GaldamUI.hideStanceMenu() else GaldamUI.renderStanceMenu() GaldamUI.stanceMenu:show() GaldamUI.stanceMenuVisible = true end end function GaldamUI.hideStanceMenu() if GaldamUI.stanceMenu then GaldamUI.stanceMenu:hide() end GaldamUI.stanceMenuVisible = false end function GaldamUI.renderStanceButton() if not GaldamUI.stance then return end local pos = tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.posture) or 0 local spd = tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.speed) or 0 local key = GaldamUI.stanceKey(pos, spd) local it = GaldamUI.stanceItem(key) local bg = GaldamUI.stanceBg(key) GaldamUI.stance:setStyleSheet("background-color:" .. bg .. "; border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:5px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.stance:echo(imgTag(it.icon, 44)) GaldamUI.attachTip(GaldamUI.stance, GaldamUI.stanceLabel(pos, spd) .. " · 변경") GaldamUI.renderStanceMenu() end function GaldamUI.renderStanceMenu() if not GaldamUI.stanceOpts then return end local pos = tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.posture) or 0 local curKey = GaldamUI.stanceKey(pos, tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.speed) or 0) for _, it in ipairs(GaldamUI.STANCE_ITEMS) do local b = GaldamUI.stanceOpts[it.key] if b then local disabled = (it.kind == "speed" and pos ~= 0) if disabled then b:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(20,20,22,225); border:1px solid #704040; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") elseif it.key == curKey then b:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(38,70,48,225); border:2px solid #5fae6f; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") else b:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(20,28,38,225); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") end b:echo(imgTag((disabled and it.disabledIcon) or it.icon, 42)) GaldamUI.attachTip(b, it.label .. (disabled and " · 서 있을 때만 가능" or "")) end end end function GaldamUI.stanceCooldownFor(it) local pos = tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.posture) or 0 local spd = tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.speed) or 0 if it.kind == "posture" then local target = tonumber(it.posture) or 0 if pos == target then return 0 end return math.max(1, math.abs(target - pos)) * 2 elseif it.kind == "speed" then if pos ~= 0 or spd == it.speed then return 0 end return 3 end return 0 end function GaldamUI.beginStanceCooldown(seconds) seconds = tonumber(seconds) or 0 if seconds <= 0 or not GaldamUI.stanceCd then return end if GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers) do pcall(killTimer, id) end end GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers = {} GaldamUI.stanceCooldownActive = true GaldamUI.stanceCd:show() for i = 0, 20 do local delay = (seconds / 20) * i local frame = string.format("stance_cd_%02d.png", i) local id = tempTimer(delay, function() if GaldamUI.stanceCd and GaldamUI.stanceCooldownActive then GaldamUI.stanceCd:echo(imgTag(frame, 56)) end end) GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers[#GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers + 1] = id end local done = tempTimer(seconds, function() GaldamUI.stanceCooldownActive = false if GaldamUI.stanceCd then GaldamUI.stanceCd:hide() end end) GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers[#GaldamUI.stanceCdTimers + 1] = done end function GaldamUI.pickStance(key) if GaldamUI.stanceCooldownActive then return end local it = GaldamUI.stanceItem(key) if not it then return end if it.kind == "speed" and (tonumber(GaldamUI.stanceState.posture) or 0) ~= 0 then return end GaldamUI.hideStanceMenu() local seconds = GaldamUI.stanceCooldownFor(it) send(it.cmd) GaldamUI.beginStanceCooldown(seconds) end -- 자세/속도 칩 갱신 function GaldamUI.updateStance(pos, spd) GaldamUI.stanceState = GaldamUI.stanceState or {} GaldamUI.stanceState.posture = tonumber(pos) or 0 GaldamUI.stanceState.speed = tonumber(spd) or 0 GaldamUI.renderStanceButton() end function GaldamUI.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not (GaldamUI.built and v) then return end if v.hp then GaldamUI.hp:setValue(tonumber(v.hp) or 0, tonumber(v.hp_max) or 100, "혈액 "..tostring(v.hp).."") end if v.cons and GaldamUI.cons then GaldamUI.cons:setValue(tonumber(v.cons) or 0, tonumber(v.cons_max) or 100, "의식 "..tostring(v.cons).."/"..tostring(v.cons_max).."") end if v.thirst then local t=tonumber(v.thirst) or 0; GaldamUI.thirst:setValue(math.min(t,500),500,string.format("목마름 %d",math.floor(t))) end if v.hunger then local h=tonumber(v.hunger) or 0; GaldamUI.hunger:setValue(math.min(h,500),500,string.format("배고픔 %d",math.floor(h))) end if v.stress then local s=tonumber(v.stress) or 0; GaldamUI.stress:setValue(math.min(s,500),500,string.format("스트레스 %d",math.floor(s))) end if v.stamina and GaldamUI.stamina then local st=tonumber(v.stamina) or 0; local sm=tonumber(v.stamina_max) or 100; GaldamUI.stamina:setValue(st, sm, string.format("기력 %d", st)) end if v.posture ~= nil and GaldamUI.updateStance then GaldamUI.updateStance(tonumber(v.posture) or 0, tonumber(v.speed) or 0) end if v.wanted then local w = tonumber(v.wanted) or 0 local nt = (w>=171 and 6) or (w>=141 and 5) or (w>=101 and 4) or (w>=61 and 3) or (w>=31 and 2) or (w>=1 and 1) or 0 local prev = GaldamUI.prevTier or 0 if nt > prev then local set = {}; for i = prev+1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=5, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+30, kind="add"} elseif nt < prev and nt > 0 then local set = {}; for i = 1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=2, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+20, kind="remove"} end GaldamUI.prevTier = nt GaldamUI.curTier = nt GaldamUI.renderWanted() end end function GaldamUI.onStatus() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Status if not (GaldamUI.built and d and GaldamUI.statusSlots) then return end local list = {} for tok in tostring(d.icons or ""):gmatch("[^,]+") do local k, sv = tok:match("(%a+):(%d+)") if k then list[#list+1] = {k=k, sv=tonumber(sv) or 1} end end local cell, step = 46, 50 for i, slot in ipairs(GaldamUI.statusSlots) do local it = list[i] if it then local sev = GaldamUI.STSEV[it.sv] or GaldamUI.STSEV[1] pcall(function() slot:move(6 + (i-1)*step, 4); slot:resize(cell, cell) end) slot:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..sev.bg.."; border:2px solid "..sev.b.."; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") slot:echo(imgTag("status_"..it.k..".png", 38)) GaldamUI.attachTip(slot, GaldamUI.STNAME[it.k] or it.k) slot:show() else slot:hide() end end end function GaldamUI.onMap() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Map if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.mapWin and d) then return end GaldamUI.mapWin:clear() if d.has == 1 and d.grid then local raw = d.grid:gsub("<>", "\27"):gsub("<>", "\n") GaldamUI.mapWin:decho(ansi2decho(raw)) else GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음 (갯담 지도 필요)") end end function GaldamUI.refresh() if not GaldamUI.built then return end pcall(function() GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 34)) end) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onStatus(); GaldamUI.renderTab() end if not GaldamUI.built then GaldamUI.build() end GaldamUI.relayout() GaldamUI.downloadImages() table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", function() GaldamUI.onRoom() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.ObjMenu", function() GaldamUI.onObjMenu() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() GaldamUI.onVitals() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Status", function() GaldamUI.onStatus() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Map", function() GaldamUI.onMap() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Players", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="players" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Skills", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="skills" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Achievements", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="ach" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", function() GaldamUI.relayout() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", function() GaldamUI.refresh() end)) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onStatus(); GaldamUI.onMap()

Script.name: GaldamLockpickQTE
Script.script:
-- ===== Galdam 자물쇠 따기 QTE (v2 클릭) ===== GaldamPick = GaldamPick or {} local GP = GaldamPick GP.W = 46 function GaldamPick_hit() -- 전역 (클릭/키 콜백용) GaldamPick.hit() end function GP.makeWindow() if not GP.win then GP.win = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "GaldamPickWin", x = "30%", y = "33%", width = "40%", height = "28%", }) GP.win:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgba(18,18,24,238); border: 2px solid #c8a05a; border-radius: 10px; ]]) GP.win:setFontSize(13) GP.win:hide() end GP.win:setClickCallback("GaldamPick_hit") -- 창 클릭 = 입력 (재로드시에도 재적용) end function GP.render() local cells = {} local needle = math.floor((GP.pos or 0) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) local zs = math.floor((GP.zstart or 0) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) local ze = math.floor(((GP.zstart or 0) + (GP.zsize or 0)) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) local cz = math.floor(((GP.zstart or 0) + (GP.zsize or 0) / 2) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) for i = 0, GP.W do if i == needle then cells[#cells+1] = "|" elseif i == cz then cells[#cells+1] = "@" elseif i >= zs and i <= ze then cells[#cells+1] = "#" else cells[#cells+1] = "-" end end local html = string.format( "

[ 자물쇠 따기 ]

%s

진행 %d / %d    라운드 %d

바늘이 초록(@중앙)일 때  창을 클릭!
", table.concat(cells), GP.prog or 0, GP.target or 5, GP.round or 1) GP.win:echo(html) end function GP.tick() if not GP.active then return end GP.pos = GP.pos + GP.dir * GP.step if GP.pos >= 100 then GP.pos = 100; GP.dir = -1 end if GP.pos <= 0 then GP.pos = 0; GP.dir = 1 end GP.render() GP.timer = tempTimer(0.045, GP.tick) end function GP.onRound() local d = gmcp.Galdam.Pick.Round if not d then return end GP.makeWindow() GP.zstart = tonumber(d.zone_start) or 40 GP.zsize = tonumber(d.zone_size) or 20 GP.prog = tonumber(d.progress) or 0 GP.target = tonumber(d.target) or 5 GP.round = tonumber(d.round) or 1 GP.step = math.max(1.8, (tonumber(d.speed) or 50) / 12) GP.pos = 0; GP.dir = 1; GP.active = true if GP.timer then killTimer(GP.timer) end GP.win:show() pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamPickWin") end) -- 격자맵보다 앞으로 (가려짐 방지) GP.tick() end function GP.hit() if not GP.active then return end GP.active = false if GP.timer then killTimer(GP.timer); GP.timer = nil end send("qtehit " .. tostring(math.floor((GP.pos or 0) + 0.5))) end function GP.onEnd() GP.active = false if GP.timer then killTimer(GP.timer); GP.timer = nil end if GP.win then GP.win:hide() end end function GP.onConnect() send("qte_on") end if GP.h1 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GP.h1) end if GP.h2 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GP.h2) end if GP.h3 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GP.h3) end GP.h1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Pick.Round", "GaldamPick.onRound") GP.h2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Pick.End", "GaldamPick.onEnd") GP.h3 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysConnectionEvent", "GaldamPick.onConnect") GP.makeWindow() if gmcp then GP.onConnect() end echo("[Galdam] 자물쇠 따기 QTE v2 로드됨. `따기 <방향>` 시작, 창 클릭으로 입력.\n")

Script.name: GaldamFishingQTE
Script.script:
-- ===== Galdam 낚시 QTE v6 ===== GaldamFish = GaldamFish or {} local GF = GaldamFish GF.W = 48 GF.biteSound = GF.biteSound or nil -- 입질 효과음 파일/URL 지정 시 재생 function GaldamFish_hit() GaldamFish.hit() end function GaldamFish_press() GaldamFish.press() end function GaldamFish_release() GaldamFish.release() end function GaldamFish_closecard() GaldamFish.closeCard() end function GF.makeWindow() if not GF.win then GF.win = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GaldamFishWin", x = "26%", y = "28%", width = "48%", height = "24%"}) GF.win:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(10,22,34,243); border: 2px solid #3a8fb7; border-radius: 10px;") GF.win:setFontSize(13) GF.win:hide() end end function GF.playBiteSound() if GF.biteSound then pcall(function() playSoundFile({name = "galdamBite", file = GF.biteSound}) end) end end -- ========== 입질 연출 (2초 뜸 + 사운드) ========== function GF.onBite() GF.makeWindow() GF.mode = "bite" GF.win:resize("48%", "24%"); GF.win:move("26%", "28%") GF.win:setClickCallback(""); GF.win:setReleaseCallback("") if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer) end GF.biteAnim = 0 GF.playBiteSound() GF.win:show() GF.biteTick() end function GF.biteTick() if GF.mode ~= "bite" then return end GF.biteAnim = GF.biteAnim + 1 local big = (GF.biteAnim % 2 == 0) local color = big and "#ff3030" or "#ffcf33" local sz = big and "23px" or "19px" GF.win:echo("


❗ 입질! ❗

찌가 까딱까딱... 곧 챔질 타이밍!
") GF.timer = tempTimer(0.22, GF.biteTick) end -- ========== 챔질 (클릭 타이밍) ========== function GF.renderHook() local cells = {} local needle = math.floor((GF.pos or 0) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) local zs = math.floor((GF.zstart or 0) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) local ze = math.floor(((GF.zstart or 0) + (GF.zsize or 0)) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) local cz = math.floor(((GF.zstart or 0) + (GF.zsize or 0) / 2) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) for i = 0, GF.W do if i == needle then cells[#cells+1] = "|" elseif i == cz then cells[#cells+1] = "🐟" elseif i >= zs and i <= ze then cells[#cells+1] = "#" else cells[#cells+1] = "~" end end GF.win:echo(string.format( "

[ 🎣 챔질! 찌가 쑥 들어간다 ]

%s

찌(|)가 🐟(초록칸)에 왔을 때  창 클릭!
", table.concat(cells))) end function GF.tickHook() if not GF.active or GF.mode ~= "hook" then return end GF.pos = GF.pos + GF.dir * GF.step if GF.pos >= 100 then GF.pos = 100; GF.dir = -1 end if GF.pos <= 0 then GF.pos = 0; GF.dir = 1 end GF.renderHook() GF.timer = tempTimer(0.045, GF.tickHook) end function GF.onHook(d) d = d or (gmcp and gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Fish and gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Hook) if not d then return end GF.makeWindow() GF.mode = "hook" GF.win:resize("48%", "24%"); GF.win:move("26%", "28%") GF.zstart = tonumber(d.zone_start) or 40 GF.zsize = tonumber(d.zone_size) or 20 GF.step = math.max(1.8, (tonumber(d.speed) or 50) / 12) GF.pos = 0; GF.dir = 1; GF.active = true GF.win:setClickCallback("GaldamFish_hit") GF.win:setReleaseCallback("") if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer) end GF.win:show() GF.tickHook() end function GF.hit() if not GF.active or GF.mode ~= "hook" then return end GF.active = false if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer); GF.timer = nil end if GF.previewMode then GF.onFight({boxsize = 22, diff = 26}); return end send("qtefish " .. tostring(math.floor((GF.pos or 0) + 0.5))) end -- ========== 힘겨루기 (스타듀 세로막대) ========== function GF.onFight(d) d = d or (gmcp and gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Fish and (gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Fight or gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Reel)) if not d then return end GF.makeWindow() GF.mode = "fight" GF.win:resize("17%", "54%"); GF.win:move("42%", "20%") GF.barHeight = tonumber(d.boxsize) or 22 GF.diff = tonumber(d.diff) or 24 GF.fishPos = 50; GF.fishTarget = 50; GF.fishMoveTimer = 10 GF.barPos = 38; GF.barVel = 0; GF.catch = 26; GF.held = false; GF.active = true GF.win:setClickCallback("GaldamFish_press") GF.win:setReleaseCallback("GaldamFish_release") if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer) end GF.win:show() GF.fightTick() end function GF.press() GF.held = true end function GF.release() GF.held = false end function GF.fightTick() if not GF.active or GF.mode ~= "fight" then return end GF.fishMoveTimer = GF.fishMoveTimer - 1 if GF.fishMoveTimer <= 0 then GF.fishTarget = math.random(3, 97) GF.fishMoveTimer = math.random(8, 30) if math.random(100) <= (GF.diff * 0.7) then GF.fishMoveTimer = math.random(3, 9) end end local fs = 1.1 + GF.diff / 36 if GF.fishPos < GF.fishTarget then GF.fishPos = math.min(GF.fishTarget, GF.fishPos + fs) elseif GF.fishPos > GF.fishTarget then GF.fishPos = math.max(GF.fishTarget, GF.fishPos - fs) end if GF.held then GF.barVel = GF.barVel + 0.52 else GF.barVel = GF.barVel - 0.44 end GF.barVel = GF.barVel * 0.90 GF.barPos = GF.barPos + GF.barVel if GF.barPos < 0 then GF.barPos = 0; GF.barVel = GF.barVel * -0.25 end if GF.barPos + GF.barHeight > 100 then GF.barPos = 100 - GF.barHeight; GF.barVel = GF.barVel * -0.25 end if GF.fishPos >= GF.barPos and GF.fishPos <= (GF.barPos + GF.barHeight) then GF.catch = math.min(100, GF.catch + 1.1) else GF.catch = math.max(0, GF.catch - 1.0) end if GF.catch >= 100 then return GF.endFight("land") end if GF.catch <= 0 then return GF.endFight("escape") end GF.renderFight() GF.timer = tempTimer(0.06, GF.fightTick) end function GF.renderFight() local R = 17 local lines = {} local fishR = R - 1 - math.floor((GF.fishPos) / 100 * (R - 1) + 0.5) local boxBot = R - 1 - math.floor((GF.barPos) / 100 * (R - 1) + 0.5) local boxTop = R - 1 - math.floor((GF.barPos + GF.barHeight) / 100 * (R - 1) + 0.5) local catchFill = math.floor((GF.catch) / 100 * R + 0.5) for r = 0, R - 1 do local cm = ((R - r) <= catchFill) and "█" or "█" local inbox = (r >= boxTop and r <= boxBot) local seg if r == fishR then seg = inbox and "🐟" or "🐟" elseif inbox then seg = "█" else seg = "│" end lines[#lines+1] = cm .. "  " .. seg end GF.win:echo("
🎣 " .. math.floor(GF.catch) .. "%
" .. table.concat(lines, "
") .. "
누름↑ 놓음↓
█에 🐟 가두기
") end function GF.endFight(outcome) GF.active = false if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer); GF.timer = nil end if GF.win then GF.win:hide() end if GF.previewMode then GF.previewMode = false cecho("\n[낚시 프리뷰] 결과: " .. outcome .. "\n") if outcome == "land" then GF.onCaught({name = "망둥어", image = ""}) end return end send("qtefish_result " .. outcome) end function GF.onEnd() GF.active = false; GF.mode = nil; GF.previewMode = false if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer); GF.timer = nil end if GF.win then GF.win:hide() end end -- ========== 포획 카드 (어종 이미지 / 5초 / 클릭 닫기) ========== function GF.makeCard() if not GF.cardWin then GF.cardWin = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GaldamFishCard", x = "34%", y = "20%", width = "32%", height = "52%"}) GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px;") GF.cardWin:setClickCallback("GaldamFish_closecard") GF.cardWin:hide() end end function GF.renderCard(imgOk) local nm = GF.cardName or "물고기" local body if imgOk then body = "









" else body = "


🐟

" end GF.cardWin:echo("
🎣 낚았다!" .. body .. "" .. nm .. "

" .. "창을 클릭하면 닫힘 (5초 후 자동)
") end function GF.onCaught(d) d = d or (gmcp and gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Fish and gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Caught) if not d then return end GF.makeCard() GF.cardName = d.name or "물고기" GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px;") local img = d.image or "" if img ~= "" then local base = img:match("([^/]+)$") or "fish.png" local fn = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamfish_" .. base if io.exists(fn) then GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px; background-image: url(" .. fn .. "); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center;") GF.renderCard(true) else GF.pendingImg = {url = img, file = fn} pcall(function() downloadFile(fn, img) end) GF.renderCard(false) end else GF.renderCard(false) end GF.cardWin:show() if GF.cardTimer then killTimer(GF.cardTimer) end GF.cardTimer = tempTimer(5.0, function() GF.closeCard() end) end function GF.closeCard() if GF.cardTimer then killTimer(GF.cardTimer); GF.cardTimer = nil end if GF.cardWin then GF.cardWin:hide() end end function GF.onDownload(_, path) if GF.pendingImg and path == GF.pendingImg.file then if GF.cardWin and GF.cardWin.shown ~= false then GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px; background-image: url(" .. path .. "); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center;") GF.renderCard(true) end GF.pendingImg = nil end end -- ========== 프리뷰 ========== function GF.preview() GF.previewMode = true GF.onBite() tempTimer(2.0, function() if GF.previewMode then GF.onHook({zone_start = 40, zone_size = 20, speed = 52}) end end) cecho("\n[낚시 프리뷰] 입질 연출 → 챔질(창 클릭) → 힘겨루기 → 포획카드 순으로 시연합니다.\n") end function GF.onPreview() GF.preview() end for _, h in ipairs({"h1","h2","h3","h4","h5","h6","h7"}) do if GF[h] then killAnonymousEventHandler(GF[h]) end end GF.h1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Hook", "GaldamFish.onHook") GF.h2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Fight", "GaldamFish.onFight") GF.h3 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.End", "GaldamFish.onEnd") GF.h4 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Reel", "GaldamFish.onFight") GF.h5 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Bite", "GaldamFish.onBite") GF.h6 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Preview", "GaldamFish.onPreview") GF.h7 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Caught", "GaldamFish.onCaught") if GF.hdl then killAnonymousEventHandler(GF.hdl) end GF.hdl = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", "GaldamFish.onDownload") GF.makeWindow() echo("[Galdam] 낚시 QTE v6 로드됨. 입질연출→챔질→힘겨루기(🐟)→포획카드. 미리보기: 낚시프리뷰\n")

Script.name: GaldamTacticalGrid
GaldamTileView
Script.script: -- ===== Galdam 타일뷰 v1: 글리프 격자의 그래픽 타일 렌더러 (토글 병행, 별도 독립 블록) ===== -- 레이어(z순): ground(타일) < decal(핏자국등) < shade(벽그림자) < obj < item < fx < actor < susdot -- < cone(시야원뿔 rgba) < tint(시간대/날씨 단일) < wx(비/눈 프레임) < glow(빛무리 radial) < fogp(시야음영/실내어둠) -- 조명/이펙트 원리: ①rgba 오버레이 라벨(틴트/원뿔/안개) ②qradialgradient(가로등/경광등/불빛무리) ③PNG 프레임 교체(비/눈/불) GaldamTileView = GaldamTileView or {} local GTV = GaldamTileView GTV.on = GTV.on or false GTV.P = GTV.P or {} GTV.frame = GTV.frame or 0 GTV.TILEVER = 2 GTV.zdirty = true -- 로드 직후 z순서 1회 재구축 (레이어 순서 변경 반영) GTV.size = GTV.size or 32 -- 현재 셀 크기 (s16/s20/s24/s28/s32 사전생성 타일 = 무스케일링, 블러 방지) GTV.haveSize = {} -- 세션마다 리셋 → 매 접속 1회 무결성 재검사 (깨진 파일 복구 기회) local TDIR = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamtiles" pcall(function() lfs.mkdir(TDIR) end) local TBASE = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Binkaze/galdamoosound@main/tiles/" -- 타일 파일 목록 (tileset_gen.py 출력과 1:1) local TFILES = {"dirt2","rockg","woodfloor","lane","crosswalk","field","paddy","weed","water_0","water_1", "wall_stone","breakwater","wall_brick","window","window_open","window_broken","door","gate","greenhouse","lighthouse","tetrapod","grave", "tree","rock","lamp","well","jangdok","bench","clothes","pole","mailbox","busstop","dog","boat","net","dryrack","buoy","reef","prop", "act_player","act_npc","act_cop","act_wild","loot","fire_0","fire_1","smoke_gray","smoke_white","smoke_gas", "blood_1","blood_2","blood_3","glass","wetg","snowg","mess"} for i = 0, 3 do for _, b in ipairs({"dirt","grass","asphalt","clearing"}) do TFILES[#TFILES+1] = b.."_"..i end end for i = 0, 15 do TFILES[#TFILES+1] = "fence_"..i end for _, v in ipairs({"car","truck","trac","police"}) do TFILES[#TFILES+1] = v.."_l"; TFILES[#TFILES+1] = v.."_r" end for i = 0, 2 do TFILES[#TFILES+1] = "rain_"..i; TFILES[#TFILES+1] = "snow_"..i end for _, f in ipairs({"wood","hardwood","tile","marble","stone","concrete","carpet","carpet_blue","carpet_green","linoleum","dirt","ondol"}) do TFILES[#TFILES+1] = "floor_"..f end local function tp(f) return TDIR .. "/s" .. GTV.size .. "/" .. f .. ".png" end -- PNG 무결성: 0바이트/404 HTML/반쯤 받은 파일 = 검은 칸의 원인 → 매직바이트 검사로 걸러 재다운 local function validPng(p) local h = io.open(p, "rb") if not h then return false end local b = h:read(8) h:close() return b ~= nil and #b >= 8 and b:byte(1) == 137 and b:sub(2, 4) == "PNG" end function GTV.ensureTiles(size) size = size or GTV.size if GTV.haveSize[size] then return end GTV.haveSize[size] = true local sdir = TDIR .. "/s" .. size pcall(function() lfs.mkdir(sdir) end) local mark = sdir .. "/ver" .. GTV.TILEVER .. ".txt" local force = not (io.exists and io.exists(mark)) for _, f in ipairs(TFILES) do local lp = sdir .. "/" .. f .. ".png" if force or not validPng(lp) then pcall(downloadFile, lp, TBASE .. "s" .. size .. "/" .. f .. ".png") end end pcall(function() local h = io.open(mark, "w"); if h then h:write("ok"); h:close() end end) end function GTV.makeWin() if GTV.win then return end GTV.win = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GTVwin", x = "28%", y = "10%", width = 560, height = 600}) GTV.win:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,10,14,246); border: 2px solid #5a8ac8; border-radius: 8px;") GTV.hdr = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GTVhdr", x = 8, y = 4, width = 540, height = 22}, GTV.win) GTV.hdr:setStyleSheet("background: transparent;") GTV.win:hide() end local function lbl(layer, i) GTV.P[layer] = GTV.P[layer] or {} local t = GTV.P[layer] if not t[i] then t[i] = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GTV_" .. layer .. "_" .. i, x = 0, y = 0, width = 8, height = 8}, GTV.win) t[i]._css = nil; t[i]._geo = nil GTV.zdirty = true end return t[i] end local function sty(l, css) if l._css ~= css then l._css = css; l:setStyleSheet(css) end end local function geo(l, x, y, w2, h2) local g = x .. "," .. y .. "," .. w2 .. "," .. h2 if l._geo ~= g then l._geo = g; l:move(x, y); l:resize(w2, h2) end l:show() end local function hideRest(layer, n) local t = GTV.P[layer] or {} for i = n + 1, #t do t[i]:hide() end end local function imgcss(f, extra) return "border-image: url(" .. tp(f) .. "); background: transparent;" .. (extra or "") end function GTV.gcss(rgbA, rgbB) return "background: qradialgradient(cx:0.5, cy:0.5, radius:0.5, fx:0.5, fy:0.5, stop:0 rgba(" .. rgbA .. "), stop:0.55 rgba(" .. rgbB .. "), stop:1 rgba(0,0,0,0)); border:0;" end GTV.imgcss = imgcss -- z순서 재구축: 라벨이 새로 생기면 레이어 순서대로 raise -- (원뿔은 틴트/날씨 '위' = 시간대 어둠/비에 안 씻기고 또렷하게) local LAYERS = {"ground","decal","shade","obj","item","fx","actor","susdot","tint","wx","cone","glow","fogp"} local function zfix() if not GTV.zdirty then return end GTV.zdirty = false for _, ly in ipairs(LAYERS) do for _, l in ipairs(GTV.P[ly] or {}) do pcall(function() l:raise() end) end end pcall(function() GTV.hdr:raise() end) end local SOLID = {wall=1, building=1, breakwater=1, wall_h=1, wall_v=1, corner=1, door=1, gate=1, lighthouse=1, greenhouse=1} local SHADE = {wall=1, building=1, breakwater=1, wall_h=1, wall_v=1, corner=1, door=1, gate=1, lighthouse=1, greenhouse=1, window=1, window_open=1, window_broken=1} -- struct kind → 풀셀(ground 교체) 파일 local SFULL = {wall="wall_stone", building="wall_brick", wall_h="wall_brick", wall_v="wall_brick", corner="wall_brick", breakwater="breakwater", window="window", window_open="window_open", window_broken="window_broken", door="door"} -- struct kind → 투명 오버레이 파일 local SOVER = {gate="gate", greenhouse="greenhouse", lighthouse="lighthouse", tetrapod="tetrapod", grave="grave"} local OBJF = {tree="tree", rock="rock", lamp="lamp", well="well", jangdok="jangdok", bench="bench", clothes="clothes", pole="pole", mailbox="mailbox", busstop="busstop", dog="dog", boat="boat", net="net", dryrack="dryrack", buoy="buoy", reef="reef", carL="car_l", carR="car_r", truckL="truck_l", truckR="truck_r", tracL="trac_l", tracR="trac_r", policeL="police_l", policeR="police_r"} local TERRF = {dirt2="dirt2", rockground="rockg", woodfloor="woodfloor", lane="lane", crosswalk="crosswalk", field="field", paddy="paddy", weed="weed", weed2="weed", water="water_0", clearing="clearing_0", asphalt="asphalt_0", tilefloor="floor_tile", deck="woodfloor"} -- 시간대 틴트: 밝은 우윳빛 금지(뽀샤시 원인) — 어둡고 채도있는 막만 local TONETINT = {[1]="rgba(18,22,62,85)", [4]="rgba(120,55,15,55)", [5]="rgba(110,40,15,90)", [6]="rgba(5,8,28,140)"} local function groundFile(biome, floor, x, y, t) if t then if t == "water" then return "water_" .. (GTV.frame % 2) end if t == "clearing" then return "clearing_" .. ((x * 7 + y * 11 + x * y) % 4) end if t == "asphalt" then return "asphalt_" .. ((x * 7 + y * 11 + x * y) % 4) end return TERRF[t] or "dirt_0" end local v = (x * 7 + y * 11 + x * y) % 4 if biome == "village" then return "dirt_" .. v elseif biome == "forest" then return "grass_" .. v elseif biome == "road" then return "asphalt_" .. v elseif biome == "sea" or biome == "ocean" then return "water_" .. (GTV.frame % 2) else local ff = "floor_" .. (floor or "ondol") for _, k in ipairs(TFILES) do if k == ff then return ff end end return "floor_ondol" end end function GTV.render(d) if not d then return end GTV.makeWin() local w = tonumber(d.w) or 9 local h = tonumber(d.h) or 9 local biome = d.biome or "indoor" local outdoor = (biome == "forest" or biome == "road" or biome == "sea" or biome == "ocean" or biome == "village") local watery = (biome == "sea" or biome == "ocean") local tone = tonumber(d.tone) or 3 local dark = tonumber(d.dark) or 0 local litrad = tonumber(d.litrad) or 0 local weather = d.weather or "clear" local watch = (tonumber(d.watch) or 0) == 1 local sx = d.self and tonumber(d.self[1]) local sy = d.self and tonumber(d.self[2]) -- 셀 크기: 화면 크기 비례 예산(가로 62%/세로 80%) → 사전생성 타일 크기로 양자화(무리스케일=또렷) local mw, mh = 1280, 800 pcall(function() mw, mh = getMainWindowSize() end) local rawCS = math.floor(math.min((mw * 0.62 - 16) / math.max(1, w), (mh * 0.80 - 36) / math.max(1, h))) local CS = 16 for _, s in ipairs({32, 28, 24, 20}) do if rawCS >= s then CS = s; break end end GTV.size = CS GTV.ensureTiles(CS) local PX, PY = 8, 28 local wg = w .. "x" .. h .. "@" .. CS if GTV._wingeo ~= wg then GTV._wingeo = wg pcall(function() GTV.win:resize(w * CS + PX * 2, h * CS + PY + 8) GTV.win:move(math.max(8, math.floor((mw - (w * CS + PX * 2)) / 2)), math.max(8, math.floor(mh * 0.06))) end) end local nm = (gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room and gmcp.Galdam.Room.name) or "전술 격자" local tnames = {"새벽", "아침", "낮", "저녁", "노을", "밤"} local sub = outdoor and (" (" .. (tnames[tone] or "") .. (weather ~= "clear" and (" · " .. weather) or "") .. ")") or "" GTV.hdr:echo("⌖ " .. nm .. "" .. sub .. " [타일뷰]") local stmap, tmap = {}, {} for _, s in ipairs(d.struct or {}) do stmap[tonumber(s.x) .. "," .. tonumber(s.y)] = s.t end for _, t in ipairs(d.terrain or {}) do tmap[tonumber(t.x) .. "," .. tonumber(t.y)] = t.t end -- 애니 레지스트리: 경량 틱이 이 라벨들'만' 갱신 (전체 재렌더 = 프레임 출렁임 원인이라 폐지) GTV.A = {pol = {}, fire = {}, water = {}} -- 시야음영(fog) 캐시 (글리프판 v8과 동일 DDA) local fog if sx and sy then local fkey = sx .. "," .. sy .. "|" .. w .. "x" .. h if GTV.fogKey == fkey and GTV.fog then fog = GTV.fog else fog = {} for yy = 0, h - 1 do for xx = 0, w - 1 do local dx, dy = xx - sx, yy - sy local steps = math.max(math.abs(dx), math.abs(dy)) for i = 1, steps - 1 do local cx = sx + math.floor(dx * i / steps + 0.5) local cy = sy + math.floor(dy * i / steps + 0.5) if SOLID[stmap[cx .. "," .. cy] or ""] then fog[xx .. "," .. yy] = true; break end end end end GTV.fog = fog; GTV.fogKey = fkey end end local function lm(x, y) if outdoor or dark < 1 then return 1.0 end if litrad <= 0 or not sx then return 0.0 end local dist = math.max(math.abs(x - sx), math.abs(y - sy)) if dist > litrad + 1 then return 0.0 end return math.max(0.14, 1.0 - dist / (litrad + 1.7)) end -- ① ground (+풀셀 struct) local gi = 0 for y = 0, h - 1 do for x = 0, w - 1 do gi = gi + 1 local l = lbl("ground", gi) local key = x .. "," .. y local st = stmap[key] local f if st and SFULL[st] then f = SFULL[st] else f = groundFile(biome, d.floor, x, y, tmap[key]) end -- 바닥은 이미지 실패시 검정 대신 흙색 폴백 (다운로드 중 검은 칸 방지) sty(l, "border-image: url(" .. tp(f) .. "); background-color: #4a4238;") geo(l, PX + x * CS, PY + y * CS, CS, CS) if watery and not st and w * h <= 400 then GTV.A.water[#GTV.A.water + 1] = l end end end hideRest("ground", gi) -- ② 데칼(바닥 흔적) local di = 0 for _, g in ipairs(d.ground or {}) do local f if g.t == "blood" then f = "blood_" .. math.min(3, math.max(1, math.floor((tonumber(g.l) or 1) / 2) + 1)) elseif g.t == "wet" then f = "wetg" elseif g.t == "snow" then f = "snowg" elseif g.t == "glass" then f = "glass" elseif g.t == "mess" then f = "mess" end if f then di = di + 1 local l = lbl("decal", di) sty(l, imgcss(f)); geo(l, PX + tonumber(g.x) * CS, PY + tonumber(g.y) * CS, CS, CS) end end hideRest("decal", di) -- ③ 벽그림자(AO) local si = 0 for k, t in pairs(stmap) do if SHADE[t] then local x, y = k:match("(%-?%d+),(%-?%d+)"); x, y = tonumber(x), tonumber(y) if y + 1 < h and not stmap[x .. "," .. (y + 1)] then si = si + 1 local l = lbl("shade", si) sty(l, "background: qlineargradient(x1:0,y1:0,x2:0,y2:1, stop:0 rgba(0,0,0,95), stop:1 rgba(0,0,0,0)); border:0;") geo(l, PX + x * CS, PY + (y + 1) * CS, CS, math.floor(CS * 0.45)) end end end hideRest("shade", si) -- ④ 오브젝트(가구/차량/투명 struct) local oi = 0 local function objAt(x, y, f, id, name) oi = oi + 1 local l = lbl("obj", oi) sty(l, imgcss(f)); geo(l, PX + x * CS, PY + y * CS, CS, CS) -- 콜백/툴팁은 대상이 바뀐 라벨만 재설정 (매 렌더 클로저 재생성 = 프레임 출렁임 원인) local ck = tostring(id or 0) .. ":" .. (name or "") if l._cid ~= ck then l._cid = ck pcall(function() if id and tonumber(id) and tonumber(id) > 0 then l:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.tacClick(tostring(id), name or "?") end) if GaldamUI and GaldamUI.attachTip then GaldamUI.attachTip(l, name or "?") end else l:setClickCallback(function() end) end end) end end for k, t in pairs(stmap) do if SOVER[t] then local x, y = k:match("(%-?%d+),(%-?%d+)") objAt(tonumber(x), tonumber(y), SOVER[t]) elseif t == "fence" then local x, y = k:match("(%-?%d+),(%-?%d+)"); x, y = tonumber(x), tonumber(y) local mk = 0 if stmap[x .. "," .. (y - 1)] == "fence" or stmap[x .. "," .. (y - 1)] == "gate" then mk = mk + 1 end if stmap[(x + 1) .. "," .. y] == "fence" or stmap[(x + 1) .. "," .. y] == "gate" then mk = mk + 2 end if stmap[x .. "," .. (y + 1)] == "fence" or stmap[x .. "," .. (y + 1)] == "gate" then mk = mk + 4 end if stmap[(x - 1) .. "," .. y] == "fence" or stmap[(x - 1) .. "," .. y] == "gate" then mk = mk + 8 end objAt(x, y, "fence_" .. mk) end end for _, c in ipairs(d.cover or {}) do local f = OBJF[c.k] or "prop" objAt(tonumber(c.x), tonumber(c.y), f, c.id, c.n) end hideRest("obj", oi) -- ⑤ 아이템 local ii = 0 for _, it in ipairs(d.items or {}) do ii = ii + 1 local l = lbl("item", ii) sty(l, imgcss("loot")) geo(l, PX + tonumber(it.x) * CS + math.floor(CS * 0.15), PY + tonumber(it.y) * CS + math.floor(CS * 0.15), math.floor(CS * 0.7), math.floor(CS * 0.7)) local ck = tostring(it.id or 0) .. ":" .. (it.n or "") if l._cid ~= ck then l._cid = ck pcall(function() if it.id then l:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.tacClick(tostring(it.id), it.n or "아이템") end) end if GaldamUI and GaldamUI.attachTip then GaldamUI.attachTip(l, it.n or "아이템") end end) end end hideRest("item", ii) -- ⑥ FX: 불(프레임) + 연기(GaldamTac CA 재사용) local fi = 0 for _, f in ipairs(d.fx or {}) do if f.t == "fire" then fi = fi + 1 local l = lbl("fx", fi) sty(l, imgcss("fire_" .. (GTV.frame % 2))) geo(l, PX + tonumber(f.x) * CS, PY + tonumber(f.y) * CS, CS, CS) GTV.A.fire[#GTV.A.fire + 1] = l end end for k, c in pairs((GaldamTac and GaldamTac.smoke) or {}) do if c.d and c.d >= 1.2 then local x, y = k:match("(%-?%d+),(%-?%d+)"); x, y = tonumber(x), tonumber(y) if x and x >= 0 and x < w and y >= 0 and y < h then fi = fi + 1 local l = lbl("fx", fi) local f = (c.t == "gas") and "smoke_gas" or ((c.t == "white") and "smoke_white" or "smoke_gray") sty(l, imgcss(f)); geo(l, PX + x * CS, PY + y * CS, CS, CS) end end end hideRest("fx", fi) -- ⑦ 액터 + 의심도 점 local ai, ui = 0, 0 local function actorAt(x, y, f, name, id) ai = ai + 1 local l = lbl("actor", ai) sty(l, imgcss(f)); geo(l, PX + x * CS, PY + y * CS, CS, CS) local ck = tostring(id or 0) .. ":" .. (name or "") if l._cid ~= ck then l._cid = ck pcall(function() if id and tonumber(id) and tonumber(id) > 0 then l:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.tacClick(tostring(id), name or "?") end) end if GaldamUI and GaldamUI.attachTip then GaldamUI.attachTip(l, name or "?") end end) end end for _, a in ipairs(d.actors or {}) do local x, y = tonumber(a.x), tonumber(a.y) if not (sx == x and sy == y) then local f = (a.k == "npc") and "act_npc" or ((a.k == "player") and "act_player" or "act_wild") local sus = tonumber(a.sus) or 0 -- 경찰류는 이름 휴리스틱으로만 구분 (표시용) local an = a.n or "" if a.k == "npc" and (an:find("순경") or an:find("경찰") or an:find("수사관") or an:find("경위")) then f = "act_cop" end actorAt(x, y, f, a.n, a.id) if a.k == "npc" and sus > 0 then ui = ui + 1 local dl = lbl("susdot", ui) local col = (sus >= 61) and "rgba(255,70,55,235)" or ((sus >= 31) and "rgba(255,150,60,235)" or "rgba(245,210,80,235)") sty(dl, "background-color: " .. col .. "; border-radius: " .. math.floor(CS * 0.12) .. "px; border: 1px solid rgba(20,20,24,200);") geo(dl, PX + x * CS + CS - math.floor(CS * 0.3), PY + y * CS, math.floor(CS * 0.25), math.floor(CS * 0.25)) end end end if sx and sy then actorAt(sx, sy, "act_player", "나") end hideRest("actor", ai); hideRest("susdot", ui) -- ⑧ 시야원뿔(rgba 오버레이) — 글리프판과 동일 기하 local ci = 0 for _, a in ipairs(d.actors or {}) do if a.k == "npc" and a.f then local ox, oy = tonumber(a.x), tonumber(a.y) local fx, fy = tonumber(a.f[1]), tonumber(a.f[2]) local sr = tonumber(a.sr) or 5 local ct = tonumber(a.ct) or 1 local sus = tonumber(a.sus) or 0 if ox and fx and (watch or sus > 0) and (fx ~= 0 or fy ~= 0) then local cr, cg, cb = 70, 200, 90 if sus >= 61 then cr, cg, cb = 235, 70, 60 elseif sus >= 31 then cr, cg, cb = 235, 150, 60 elseif sus >= 1 then cr, cg, cb = 220, 200, 70 end for cy = math.max(0, oy - sr), math.min(h - 1, oy + sr) do for cx = math.max(0, ox - sr), math.min(w - 1, ox + sr) do local vx, vy = cx - ox, cy - oy local dist = math.max(math.abs(vx), math.abs(vy)) if dist >= 1 and dist <= sr then local fdot = fx * vx + fy * vy local fcr = fx * vy - fy * vx if fdot > 0 and math.abs(fcr) <= fdot * ct then ci = ci + 1 local l = lbl("cone", ci) -- 또렷하게: 바닥 알파 40 + 거리감쇠, 같은 색 얇은 테두리 (틴트 위 레이어라 안 씻김) local aint = 40 + math.floor((1 - dist / (sr + 1.5)) * 85) sty(l, "background-color: rgba(" .. cr .. "," .. cg .. "," .. cb .. "," .. aint .. "); border:1px solid rgba(" .. cr .. "," .. cg .. "," .. cb .. ",110);") geo(l, PX + cx * CS, PY + cy * CS, CS, CS) end end end end end end end hideRest("cone", ci) -- ⑨ 시간대 틴트(단일) + 날씨 local tl = lbl("tint", 1) local tcss = outdoor and TONETINT[tone] or nil if weather == "fog" and outdoor then tcss = "rgba(165,168,174,95)" elseif weather == "storm" and outdoor then tcss = "rgba(28,38,66,95)" end if tcss then sty(tl, "background-color: " .. tcss .. "; border:0;") geo(tl, PX, PY, w * CS, h * CS) else tl:hide() end local wl = lbl("wx", 1) if outdoor and (weather == "rain" or weather == "snow" or weather == "storm") then local wt = (weather == "snow") and "snow" or "rain" sty(wl, imgcss(wt .. "_" .. (GTV.frame % 3))); geo(wl, PX, PY, w * CS, h * CS) GTV.A.wxl = wl; GTV.A.wxt = wt else wl:hide() end -- ⑩ 빛무리(radial): 가로등(야간) + 경광등(점멸) + 불 local gli = 0 local function glowAt(x, y, R, rgbA, rgbB) gli = gli + 1 local l = lbl("glow", gli) sty(l, GTV.gcss(rgbA, rgbB)) local px0 = PX + x * CS - R * CS local py0 = PY + y * CS - R * CS geo(l, px0, py0, CS * (R * 2 + 1), CS * (R * 2 + 1)) return l end local lampOn = outdoor and (tone == 1 or tone >= 4) for _, c in ipairs(d.cover or {}) do if c.k == "lamp" and lampOn then glowAt(tonumber(c.x), tonumber(c.y), 2, "255,222,130,130", "255,210,110,45") elseif c.k == "policeL" then local on = (GTV.frame % 2) == 0 local cA = on and "245,60,60,150" or "60,100,245,150" local cB = on and "245,60,60,50" or "60,100,245,50" GTV.A.pol[#GTV.A.pol + 1] = glowAt(tonumber(c.x), tonumber(c.y), 3, cA, cB) end end for _, f in ipairs(d.fx or {}) do if f.t == "fire" then glowAt(tonumber(f.x), tonumber(f.y), 2, "255,150,40,150", "255,120,30,55") end end hideRest("glow", gli) -- ⑪ 시야음영 + 실내 어둠 (셀별 합성) local fpi = 0 for y = 0, h - 1 do for x = 0, w - 1 do local a = 0 if fog and fog[x .. "," .. y] and not (sx == x and sy == y) then a = 150 end local m = lm(x, y) if m < 1.0 then a = math.max(a, math.floor((1 - m) * 235)) end if a > 8 then fpi = fpi + 1 local l = lbl("fogp", fpi) sty(l, "background-color: rgba(7,9,15," .. a .. "); border:0;") geo(l, PX + x * CS, PY + y * CS, CS, CS) end end end hideRest("fogp", fpi) zfix() if GTV.on then GTV.win:show() end -- 애니 필요시 틱 (경광등/불/비눈/물/연기) local anim = (#GTV.A.pol > 0) or (#GTV.A.fire > 0) or (#GTV.A.water > 0) or (GTV.A.wxl ~= nil) if not anim then for _, f in ipairs(d.fx or {}) do if f.t == "smoke" then anim = true; break end end end if not anim and GaldamTac and GaldamTac.smoke and next(GaldamTac.smoke) then anim = true end GTV.needAnim = anim if anim and GTV.on and not GTV.timer then GTV.timer = tempTimer(0.4, "GaldamTileView.tick()") end end -- 경량 틱: 애니 라벨만 스타일 갱신 (전체 재렌더 금지 — 프레임 안정성). 연기 확산 중에만 풀 렌더 function GTV.tick() GTV.timer = nil if not (GTV.on and GTV.lastData) then return end GTV.frame = GTV.frame + 1 local smoky = GaldamTac and GaldamTac.smoke and next(GaldamTac.smoke) local hasFx = false for _, f in ipairs(GTV.lastData.fx or {}) do if f.t == "fire" or f.t == "smoke" then hasFx = true; break end end if smoky or hasFx then if (GTV.frame % 2) == 0 and GaldamTac and GaldamTac.smokeStep then pcall(GaldamTac.smokeStep, GTV.lastData) end GTV.render(GTV.lastData) else local A = GTV.A or {} local on = (GTV.frame % 2) == 0 local cA = on and "245,60,60,150" or "60,100,245,150" local cB = on and "245,60,60,50" or "60,100,245,50" for _, l in ipairs(A.pol or {}) do if l._css then l._css = nil end; l:setStyleSheet(GTV.gcss(cA, cB)) end if A.wxl and A.wxt then local c = imgcss(A.wxt .. "_" .. (GTV.frame % 3)); A.wxl._css = c; A.wxl:setStyleSheet(c) end for _, l in ipairs(A.water or {}) do local c = imgcss("water_" .. (GTV.frame % 2)); l._css = c; l:setStyleSheet(c) end if GTV.needAnim then GTV.timer = tempTimer(0.4, "GaldamTileView.tick()") end end end function GTV.onTac() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Tac if not d then return end GTV.lastData = d GTV.fogKey = nil if GTV.on then GTV.render(d); GTV.win:show() end end function GTV.onRoom() if GTV.win then GTV.win:hide() end if GTV.timer then pcall(killTimer, GTV.timer); GTV.timer = nil end GTV.lastData = nil end -- 타일 다운로드 완료 → 스타일 캐시 비우고 재도색 (Qt가 '깨진 이미지'를 캐시한 칸 복구) function GTV.refreshTiles() for ly, pool in pairs(GTV.P or {}) do for _, l in ipairs(pool) do if l._css and l._css:find("border-image", 1, true) then pcall(function() l:setStyleSheet("background: transparent;") end) end l._css = nil end end if GTV.on and GTV.lastData then GTV.render(GTV.lastData) end end function GTV.dlRefresh() GTV.dlTimer = nil GTV.refreshTiles() end function GTV.onDl(_, path) if type(path) ~= "string" or not path:find("galdamtiles", 1, true) then return end if not (GTV.on and GTV.lastData) then return end -- 114개가 연달아 도착하므로 디바운스 (마지막 도착 후 한 번만 재도색) if GTV.dlTimer then pcall(killTimer, GTV.dlTimer) end GTV.dlTimer = tempTimer(0.7, "GaldamTileView.dlRefresh()") end function GTV.toggle() GTV.on = not GTV.on if GTV.on then GTV.ensureTiles() echo("[Galdam] 타일뷰 ON — 격자 룸에서 그래픽 타일로 표시 (다시 '타일뷰' 입력=글리프 복귀)\n") local d = (GaldamTac and GaldamTac.lastData) or (gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Tac) if d then GTV.lastData = d; GTV.fogKey = nil; GTV.render(d); GTV.win:show() if GaldamTac and GaldamTac.win then GaldamTac.win:hide(); GaldamTac.shown = false end end else echo("[Galdam] 타일뷰 OFF — 글리프 격자로 복귀\n") if GTV.win then GTV.win:hide() end if GTV.timer then pcall(killTimer, GTV.timer);
