GTV.timer = nil end if GaldamTac and GaldamTac.lastData and GaldamTac.win then GaldamTac.render(GaldamTac.lastData); GaldamTac.win:show(); GaldamTac.shown = true end end end if GTV.alias then pcall(killAlias, GTV.alias) end GTV.alias = tempAlias("^타일뷰$", [[GaldamTileView.toggle()]]) if GTV.h1 then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GTV.h1) end if GTV.h2 then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GTV.h2) end if GTV.h3 then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GTV.h3) end GTV.h1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Tac", "GaldamTileView.onTac") GTV.h2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", "GaldamTileView.onRoom") GTV.h3 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", "GaldamTileView.onDl") GTV.makeWin() GTV.ensureTiles() echo("[Galdam] 타일뷰 v2.1 로드됨 — '타일뷰' 토글 (PNG무결성검사+다운완료 자동재도색, 화면비례 크기)\n")

Script.name: GaldamMoveKeys
Script.script: -- ===== 이동/채팅 모드 격리 (백틱 ` 토글) — 독립 블록 + tempKey ===== -- 블록 분리(gui105)로 Mudlet 재시작에도 이 블록은 로드됨 → tempKey 매로드 재생성으로 충분. -- ⚠️v38/v39 permKey 잔재(GK_*)는 백틱 중복바인딩 유발 → 이름으로 kill+disable 정리. GaldamKeys = GaldamKeys or {} local GK = GaldamKeys GK.on = GK.on or false GK.usePerm = nil -- 구 permKey 잔재 제거(이름) + 비활성화 (둘중 되는걸로) for _, nm in ipairs({"GK_toggle","GK_W","GK_S","GK_A","GK_D","GK_Q","GK_E","GK_Z","GK_C","GK_F","GK_R","GK_N8","GK_N5","GK_N4","GK_N6","GK_N7","GK_N9","GK_N1","GK_N3","GK_N2","GK_N0"}) do pcall(function() killKey(nm) end) pcall(function() disableKey(nm) end) end for _, id in ipairs(GK.permIds or {}) do pcall(killKey, id) end GK.permIds = {} for _, id in ipairs(GK.ids or {}) do pcall(killKey, id) end GK.ids = {} if GK.tid then pcall(killKey, GK.tid); GK.tid = nil end local KP = 0x20000000 local N=[[send("\235\182\129")]]; local S=[[send("\235\130\168")]] local W=[[send("\236\132\156")]]; local E=[[send("\235\143\153")]] local NW=[[send("\235\182\129\236\132\156")]]; local NE=[[send("\235\182\129\235\143\153")]] local SW=[[send("\235\130\168\236\132\156")]]; local SE=[[send("\235\130\168\235\143\153")]] local SR=[[send("\236\136\152\236\131\137")]]; local LK=[[send("\235\179\180\234\184\176")]] local WASD = {{0x57,N},{0x53,S},{0x41,W},{0x44,E},{0x51,NW},{0x45,NE},{0x5A,SW},{0x43,SE},{0x46,SR},{0x52,LK}} local NUM = {{0x38,N},{0x35,S},{0x34,W},{0x36,E},{0x37,NW},{0x39,NE},{0x31,SW},{0x33,SE},{0x32,LK},{0x30,SR}} function GK.unbind() for _, id in ipairs(GK.ids) do pcall(killKey, id) end GK.ids = {} end function GK.bind() GK.unbind() for _, kv in ipairs(WASD) do local ok, id = pcall(tempKey, kv[1], kv[2]); if ok and id then GK.ids[#GK.ids+1]=id end end for _, kv in ipairs(NUM) do local o1,i1 = pcall(tempKey, KP, kv[1], kv[2]) if o1 and i1 then GK.ids[#GK.ids+1]=i1 else local o2,i2 = pcall(tempKey, kv[1], KP, kv[2]); if o2 and i2 then GK.ids[#GK.ids+1]=i2 end end end end function GK.setMode(on) GK.on = on if on then GK.bind() else GK.unbind() end pcall(function() GK.ind = GK.ind or GKInd if not GK.ind then GK.ind = Geyser.Label:new({name="GKInd", x="30%", y="5.0%", width=370, height=22}) end GK.ind:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(16,28,40,236); border:1px solid #5a8ac8; border-radius:5px; qproperty-alignment:AlignCenter;") GK.ind:echo(on and "<font color='#9fe8b0'>\226\151\143 \236\157\180\235\143\153\235\170\168\235\147\156: WASD/QEZC \236\157\180\235\143\153 (\234\184\176 \235\176\177\237\139\137=\236\177\132\237\140\133)</font>" or "<font color='#c8a05a'>\226\151\139 \236\177\132\237\140\133\235\170\168\235\147\156 (\234\184\176 \235\176\177\237\139\137 \235\136\140\235\165\180\235\169\180 \236\157\180\235\143\153)</font>") GK.ind:show() end) end function GK.toggle() GK.setMode(not GK.on) end function GK.bindToggle() if GK.tid then pcall(killKey, GK.tid); GK.tid = nil end local okt, tid = pcall(tempKey, 0x60, [[GaldamKeys.toggle()]]) if okt and tid then GK.tid = tid end end GK.bindToggle() GK.setMode(GK.on) -- 세션 중 패치 재설치 대비 안전망 function GK.reinit() GK.bindToggle(); GK.setMode(GK.on) end if GK.h_conn then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GK.h_conn) end if GK.h_vit then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GK.h_vit); GK.h_vit = nil end GK.h_conn = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysConnectionEvent", function() pcall(function() GaldamKeys.reinit() end) pcall(function() tempTimer(2.5, function() GaldamKeys.reinit() end) end) end) echo("[Galdam] 이동/채팅 모드 격리 로드 (독립블록/tempKey) — 백틱(`) 토글\n")
